scene: A solid square {{material}} surface with sharp 90-degree corners filling the entire canvas edge-to-edge. The surface is covered with decorative {{theme_name}}-themed relief patterns and texture. There is absolutely NO central symbol, icon, or focal emblem — only continuous surface decoration.
style: flat vector, bold cel-shaded, high-contrast graphic style
lighting: simple two-tone cel shading with highlight on upper-left and shadow on lower-right

background.details: NO background layer. The solid {{material}} block surface occupies 100% of the canvas.

composition: evenly distributed decorative patterns across the entire surface with NO focal point, NO central element, NO dominant symbol — just continuous ornamental texture
medium: digital vector-style illustration with minimal texture
details: the block fills 100% of the canvas — sharp corners, no rounded edges, no gaps
surface covered with continuous {{theme_name}} decorative patterns ({{theme_keyword_1}}, {{theme_keyword_2}})
absolutely NO central symbol, icon, emblem, or focal element
the decoration is distributed evenly — like wallpaper or textile, not centered around anything
outermost 8-10% of surface darkens using the base {{material}} tone
limited to 2-3 tonal shades of {{primary_color}} for clarity
effects: surface-integrated vignette using multiply shading of {{material}} color
usage_notes: This is a BACKGROUND SURFACE ONLY. A separate centerpiece symbol will be composited on top programmatically. The surface must have NO central focal element — only evenly distributed decorative texture.
